title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 408.695 - Statute of limitations
text:
408.695.  Statute of limitations. — An action to enforce any provision of sections 408.675 to 408.700 may be brought in the circuit court within three years from the date on which the violation occurs or on the date of discovery of such violation, whichever is later.
(L. 1989 H.B. 82 § 14)
